title: The Race for the One Piece Turns Brutal
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, York, Brogy, Kid, Shanks, Unknown person #8 as Shanks crushes Kid near Elbaf, showing how violently the race for the One Piece has accelerated.
scene: Shanks crushes Kid near Elbaf, showing how violently the race for the One Piece has accelerated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll blast them down to the ocean floor in ten seconds flat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's about to do some serious damage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sounds like you've seen a hell of a future.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Woah! What the hell is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it me... or are we getting pulled in?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get all the ships to move aside now!
